records.question: Which menus have a status of complete, no more than 2 pages, date on or after 1963-07-24, call number exactly 1963-0043_wotm, physical description exactly 26x20.5cm folded; 26x41cm open, notes exactly English is secondary language, and dish count exactly 85?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
WHERE menu.status = 'complete' AND menu.page_count <= 2 AND menu.date >= '1963-07-24' AND menu.call_number = '1963-0043_wotm' AND menu.physical_description = '26x20.5cm folded; 26x41cm open' AND menu.notes = 'English is secondary language' AND menu.dish_count = 85
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id
FROM Menu
WHERE status = 'complete'
  AND page_count <= 2
  AND date >= '1963-07-24'
  AND call_number = '1963-0043_wotm'
  AND physical_description = '26x20.5cm folded; 26x41cm open'
  AND notes = 'English is secondary language'
  AND dish_count = 85

records.question: What menus dated on 1906-12-31 have a status of complete, use Dollars with the $ symbol, contain no more than 266 dishes, and have exactly 4 pages?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
WHERE menu.status = 'complete' AND menu.currency = 'Dollars' AND menu.dish_count <= 266 AND menu.page_count = 4 AND menu.currency_symbol = '$' AND menu.date = '1906-12-31'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Menu WHERE status = 'complete' AND currency = 'Dollars' AND dish_count <= 266 AND page_count = 4 AND currency_symbol = '$' AND date = '1906-12-31'

records.question: Which menus have a status of complete and a call number exactly equal to 1933-0260_wotm?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
WHERE menu.status = 'complete' AND menu.call_number = '1933-0260_wotm'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Menu WHERE status = 'complete' AND call_number = '1933-0260_wotm'

records.question: Which menus with call number 1906-093 have exactly 21 dishes, at least 12 pages, and are from SAVOY, NEW YORK, NY for a COMPLIMENTARY/TESTIMONIAL occasion, where the pages are at least 2414.0 wide but no more than 3713.0 high, and notes say MENU IN FRENCH; LISTS WINES SERVED WITH INDIVIDUAL COURSES; GUESTS OF HONOR LISTED; TOASTS; SONGS; COVER INCLUDES PHOTOGRAPH OF MR. TOWNSEND AND SKETCHES RELATING TO LAW AND COURT; RIBBON ATTACHMENT;?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
JOIN menupage ON menu.id = menupage.menu_id
WHERE menu.call_number = '1906-093' AND menu.dish_count = 21 AND menu.page_count >= 12 AND menu.place = 'SAVOY, NEW YORK, NY' AND menu.occasion = 'COMPLIMENTARY/TESTIMONIAL' AND menupage.full_width >= 2414.0 AND menupage.full_height <= 3713.0 AND menu.notes = 'MENU IN FRENCH; LISTS WINES SERVED WITH INDIVIDUAL COURSES; GUESTS OF HONOR LISTED; TOASTS; SONGS; COVER INCLUDES PHOTOGRAPH OF MR. TOWNSEND AND SKETCHES RELATING TO LAW AND COURT; RIBBON ATTACHMENT;'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM Menu m
INNER JOIN MenuPage mp ON m.id = mp.menu_id
WHERE m.call_number = '1906-093'
  AND m.dish_count = 21
  AND m.page_count >= 12
  AND m.place = 'SAVOY, NEW YORK, NY'
  AND m.occasion = 'COMPLIMENTARY/TESTIMONIAL'
  AND m.notes = 'MENU IN FRENCH; LISTS WINES SERVED WITH INDIVIDUAL COURSES; GUESTS OF HONOR LISTED; TOASTS; SONGS; COVER INCLUDES PHOTOGRAPH OF MR. TOWNSEND AND SKETCHES RELATING TO LAW AND COURT; RIBBON ATTACHMENT;'
  AND mp.full_width >= 2414.0
  AND mp.full_height <= 3713.0

records.question: Which menus from The New Broadway Restaurant and Lunch Room have at least 1 page and 55 or more dishes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
WHERE menu.page_count >= 1 AND menu.dish_count >= 55 AND menu.name = 'The New Broadway Restaurant and Lunch Room'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Menu WHERE page_count >= 1 AND dish_count >= 55 AND name = 'The New Broadway Restaurant and Lunch Room'

records.question: Which menus dated on 1933-11-21 with call number 1933-0343_wotm have a physical description of 21.5x14cm folded; 21.5x28cm open and contain at most 13 dishes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
JOIN menupage ON menu.id = menupage.menu_id
WHERE menu.physical_description = '21.5x14cm folded; 21.5x28cm open' AND menu.dish_count <= 13 AND menu.date = '1933-11-21' AND menu.call_number = '1933-0343_wotm'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id
FROM Menu m
INNER JOIN MenuPage mp ON m.id = mp.menu_id
WHERE m.physical_description = '21.5x14cm folded; 21.5x28cm open'
  AND m.dish_count <= 13
  AND m.date = '1933-11-21'
  AND m.call_number = '1933-0343_wotm'
